name: Line  Connect
author: Poki
description: Line Connect is a puzzle game where you get to create cool shapes and patterns by connecting lines! Drag your lines freely on the board, but be careful not to overlap them. Watch out for the fixed nails—they can't be moved, so you'll have to get creative to work around them. Can you solve all the puzzles and connect all the lines in one go? How to play Line Connect? Tap and hold on to a line to drag it! Who created Line Connect? Line Connect is created by jimou game. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Line Connect for free? You can play Line Connect for free on Poki. Can I play Line Connect on mobile devices and desktop? Line Connect can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
